data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"902a-393b","generatedAt":"2026-04-06T23:19:51Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Test bloat cleanup","description":"Triage ~40+
